title: Career Internships Programs
content:
Internship Guide for CS Students - Specific Programs
Morgan State University

---

FIRST AND SECOND YEAR INTERNSHIP PROGRAMS

- Google STEP (Student Training in Engineering Program): For first and second-year students interested in software engineering
- Microsoft Explore: For first and second-year students to explore software development
- Meta University: For first and second-year students in engineering
- Amazon Future Engineer: Various programs for early-career students

---

RESEARCH AND INTERNSHIP OPPORTUNITIES

For research, internship and fellowship opportunities for SCMNS Students, refer to:
- https://docs.google.com/spreadsheets/d/1TczO-DhiHnqeMJ6q875rRxLfhRkV7abe-WfZQiQ7eJY/edit?gid=0#gid=0
- https://www.morgan.edu/school-of-computer-mathematical-and-natural-sciences/students/research-and-internships
